response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 95
REASON: The document fundamentally misrepresents Illinois tenant law by falsely claiming tenants must vacate within 5 days without any right to cure or court process, contradicting the Illinois Forcible Entry and Detainer Act which provides pay-or-quit cure rights and requires judicial proceedings for eviction.
